query:
ALTER TABLE appointments 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS packageBookingId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS packageLocalId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sessionNumber INT NULL;
